title: The Mutiny
description:
THE MUTINY — OPEN WORLD ZOMBIE SURVIVAL RPG

Scavenge. Survive. Don't get infected.

The Mutiny is starting off as a small third-person open-world zombie survival RPG. Explore a post-apocalyptic underground compound, scavenge for gear, build your survivor, and fight through whatever the world throws at you. No waiting timers. No energy systems. A real survival sandbox. The map is being updated weekly with new underground and above ground areas. 

YOUR SURVIVOR. YOUR LOOK.

Build your character from scratch — body weight, musculature, skin tone, hair, and more. You start with nothing but your survivor in their underwear. Every piece of clothing and armor you find fits your body perfectly, no matter how you built it.

25 ARMOR SLOTS. ENDLESS BUILDS.

Helmet, face mask, torso, shoulders, elbows, gloves, pants, knees, boots — 25 individual armor slots, all equippable. Six full armor sets to find, mix, and match. Every combination changes how you look and how you play.

SURVIVAL WITH REAL WEIGHT

Hunger drains. Thirst builds. Stamina fades when you run. The heavier your loadout, the faster it goes. Gear wears down from use — repair what you can, replace what you can't.

ZOMBIES THAT FIGHT BACK

Walkers shamble toward you, some carrying toxic infections. Runners sprint in toxic, lunger, and exploder variants. Gas Zombies poison everything around them. Contaminated Zombies carry the virus and pass it to you. Shoot off a leg and they crawl. Take the head and they drop.

THE ARSENAL

Thirteen firearms across every role — pistols, revolvers, SMGs, burst and full-auto rifles, a bolt-action sniper, marksman rifles, combat and double-barrel shotguns, and a silent crossbow. With a gun in hand, a quick-melee button instantly swings your holstered melee weapon and snaps back to your gun without breaking stride.

TWELVE WAYS TO BLOW THEM APART

Grenades on a timed fuse. Molotovs that break into fire. Freeze Grenades that lock zombies in ice. Surge Grenades that fry them with electricity. Tack Grenades that stick to walls and zombies. Homing Lock Grenades that hunt their target — with burner, freeze, and surge variants. A MK3 Lock that splits into three independent homing rounds. Zombie Attractors that drag a horde into one spot. And C4 you place and detonate on command.

HORDE ZONES

Optional wave-survival zones dropped into the world. Step in and the system kicks in — escalating waves until you clear the zone or pull out. Each has its own wave count, dynamic music, and a fast-forward button between waves. Walk past them, or walk in for a real fight.

THE ZOMBIE VIRUS

Get infected and your max health starts to decay. Manage it with antibodies, or find the cure before it's too late.

GAS MASKS + CONTAMINATION ZONES

Toxic fog zones are scattered across the map. Without a gas mask you won't last inside them. Maintain your mask to push deeper.

LOOT YOUR OWN CORPSE

Death doesn't reset the world. When you die and respawn, your old body reanimates as a zombie — still wearing all your gear — and roams the world. Fight your way back to it, put it down, and reclaim your loadout. If you can reach it.

SCAVENGE, REPAIR & TRADE

Zombie Guts are the currency of the apocalypse, dropped by every zombie you kill. Equip the Guts Collector to auto-pull guts as you fight. Spend them at six specialized vendors — Weapons & Ammo, Explosives, Clothing & Armor, Lanterns & Gas Masks, Backpacks & Pouches, and Protective Gear. Repair broken gear at the Repair Station. Store what you don't want to lose in your personal stash.

Full controller support. Regular updates from a solo developer.
description_short: A third-person zombie survival RPG built by one solo developer. Scavenge a post-apocalyptic tunnel system, manage gear that breaks, hunger that bites, and a world that gets darker the longer you stay alive.
